resources.string: VPN is on. You can access the phone using either the VPN IP or Wi-Fi IP. If Wi-Fi IP doesn’t work, enable ‘Allow LAN traffic’ in VPN settings or turn off the VPN.
When logging in on the webpage, we\'ll display a confirmation popup in the app for added security.

Step 1: Connect your phone and computer to the same wireless network.

Method 1: Connect your computer and phone to the same Wi-Fi network.
Method 2: Turn on your phone's hotspot and connect your computer to the phone's hotspot.

Step 2: Open a web browser on your computer and enter the web address displayed on the APP homepage.

1. The computer browser cannot open web page.

The wireless router may have AP isolation enabled, preventing communication between the computer and the phone. Please go to the router settings interface to disable the AP isolation function.

2. The computer browser displays a warning after entering an HTTPS web page address: "Your connection is not private."

You can click "Proceed to x.x.x.x (unsafe)" to continue. Simple uses a self-signed TLS certificate to encrypt the website.

Port {{ port }} is currently in use. You can tap the \'Fix\' button to automatically change the port, or you can choose to tap the edit icon next to the URL address to manually select a different port.

The ports {{ port }} are currently in use. You have the option to tap the \'Fix\' button to automatically change the port, or you can choose to tap the edit icon next to the URL address to manually select a different port.
The URL token encrypts data in URLs. If it\'s reset, old token-encrypted URLs become inaccessible.
HTTP server is not started. Relaunch the PlainApp and try again.
To receive messages from others, please enable Web on PC service.
The token is only for api request testing, return cleartext in the api response.\nPut \"Authorization: Bearer <token>\" in the api request headers.
If you see \"Your connection is not private\" error, simply click the "Advanced" button and click "Proceed to …" button, then Chrome will trust this URL for the remainder of the browser session.
Microphone permission is disabled. Please enable it in Settings to mirror system audio.
Enter the above address in your computer\'s browser, ensuring that your phone and computer are on the same local network.
HTTP server started failed. To restart it, please tap the "Relaunch APP" button.
The HTTP server has been intentionally stopped. To restart it, please tap the "Relaunch APP" button.
Almost done! Just tap "Relaunch APP" to take effect.
Access your phone from a computer browser.
Scan QR code to access web address
